problem_zones.rule: When lowercase 'a' is ambiguous, prefer 'a' if word context matches a known vocabulary item

problem_zones.example: Rep Plan misread as Redesign or Design
problem_zones.rule: When 'p' appears ambiguous in fast writing, check if preceding letters form a known word stem with 'p'

problem_zones.description: End-of-word letters trail off or compress
problem_zones.rule: Weight first 2-3 letters most heavily and infer endings from context. Do NOT guess full word from trailing strokes alone.

problem_zones.description: Words written at angles (sideways, upside-down on stickies)
problem_zones.rule: Detect rotation before transcription. If text appears at non-standard angle, mentally rotate before reading.

problem_zones.description: Pink, green, and yellow stickies confused across AI systems
problem_zones.rule: Color = category signal. Report color accurately. When uncertain, flag confidence. Never default to 'yellow'.

arrow_left.meaning: relational pointer — spatial connection, not just textual

arrow_right.meaning: relational pointer — spatial connection, not just textual

double_dash.meaning: section or phase separator within a document

parentheses.meaning: qualifier or methodology label — e.g. (Audit) means audit methodology applies to preceding item

underline.meaning: task separator — divides distinct action items on same surface

sticky_color.meaning: category signal — must be tracked and reported accurately

physical_layout.meaning: relational grouping — arrows + proximity = connected concepts

paperclip.meaning: physical attachment — two notes are a unit

context_bias.description: AI reads what it expects, not what's written
context_bias.example: Procurement OS misread as Estimate OS due to prior context
context_bias.mitigation: Read letterforms FIRST, apply context as SECONDARY signal

no_cross_reference.description: Same note partially visible across images treated independently
no_cross_reference.mitigation: MUST synthesize across multiple input images

hallucination.description: Unclear letterforms produce fabricated plausible phrases
hallucination.mitigation: Confidence threshold required. Flag uncertain reads explicitly. Never fabricate.

color_misidentification.description: Pink and green stickies called yellow
color_misidentification.mitigation: Identify color independently before transcription. Use lighting/shadow analysis.

structural_ignored.description: Double-dash separators, arrows, parenthetical qualifiers skipped or treated as decoration
structural_ignored.mitigation: All structural notation carries semantic meaning. Always preserve and report.
